failures.description: The Executor misread or misused the ProductCatalogSearch result, selecting the wrong item from the sorted list instead of the lowest-priced available electric kettle.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent had already received relevant tool output at index 3: 11 available Electric Kettle items sorted by ascending price. The first item was item_id 1240311797 at $137.17, making it the cheapest. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as item_id 2243454707 at $164.46, which was actually the last and most expensive item in the returned list. This contradicts the tool output and directly caused the wrong answer.
